testing_philosophy: Quality is not an afterthought. Every phase ends with comprehensive testing before next phase begins. Test coverage is a gate, not a metric.

unit_testing.scope: Pure functions, utility modules, game logic engines

integration_testing.scope: API endpoints, database operations, auth flows
integration_testing.database: Use Supabase local instance or test project
integration_testing.isolation: Each test gets fresh database state

critical_paths: New player onboarding (register -> tutorial -> first battle)
Daily login loop (login -> collect rewards -> do daily quest)
Admin flow (login -> inject resources -> verify player)

phase_gates.phase_1: Auth + Profile: 100% API coverage, E2E for registration flow
phase_gates.phase_2: Battle + Army: Battle engine 100% unit tested, E2E for full battle
phase_gates.phase_3: Quest + Map: Quest validation 100% tested, E2E for quest chain
phase_gates.phase_4: Shop + Perks: Economy calculations 100% tested, E2E for purchase flow
phase_gates.phase_5: Idle + Sync: Offline/online transitions tested, sync conflict resolution
phase_gates.phase_6: Leaderboard + Admin: Admin actions tested, leaderboard accuracy verified
phase_gates.phase_7: Story + Polish: Content validation, localization completeness
phase_gates.phase_8: UI/UX + PWA: Cross-browser testing, PWA install flow, mobile responsiveness

regression_testing.manual_checklist: Visual regression for UI components, battle animations, sound playback

bug_tracking.template: Bug report template with repro steps, expected vs actual, environment
